text: The transition from the quiet, open lobby to this vibrant R+D exhibit feels like stepping from contemplation into curiosity. In the lobby, I felt the weight of silence, aware of my own presence and the subtle hum of artificial light. Now, among these bold colors and screens, I'm drawn toward inquiry—invited to ponder not just what is displayed, but how knowledge itself is constructed. I feel a sense of anticipation, as though on the threshold of discovery, questioning how I, as a thinker, relate to this evolving dialogue between humans and machines.
